name: Mirae Asset Daewoo Co., Ltd. Q150 CORE5 ETN 13
summary: Mirae Asset Daewoo Co., Ltd. Q150 CORE5 ETN 13 is an Exchange Traded Note (ETN) managed by Mirae Asset Daewoo Co., Ltd, tracking the performance of a specific basket of stocks. It is listed on the Korea Exchange. Additional information is needed to determine the exact index being tracked.
